---
title: "Data sources"
subtitle: "Every number on this site is traceable to a public source. Here they are."
---

## Quantitative sources

| Source | Endpoint / Package | Indicator(s) | Refresh | Used in |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| World Bank Open Data (WDI) | [`api.worldbank.org/v2`](https://api.worldbank.org/v2/) via R pkg `WDI` | `NE.TRD.GNFS.ZS`, `NY.GDP.MKTP.CD`, `NE.EXP.GNFS.ZS`, `NE.IMP.GNFS.ZS` | Annual | Charts C & D |
| FRED (St. Louis Fed) | `fredgraph.csv?id=...` | `DCOILWTICO`, `DCOILBRENTEU` | Daily | Charts A & B |

No credentials are required for either endpoint. Both are snapshotted into
`data/raw/` so a CI run with no network access will still render a site.

## Qualitative / timeline sources

The `data/events.yml` file aggregates reporting from the following outlets.
Each individual event cites the publication it was sourced from.

- Wikipedia: [2026 Iran war](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_Iran_war),
  [Economic impact of the 2026 Iran war](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Economic_impact_of_the_2026_Iran_war),
  [2026 Strait of Hormuz crisis](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_Strait_of_Hormuz_crisis)
- [Britannica — 2026 Iran war](https://www.britannica.com/event/2026-Iran-war)
- CNBC ([Apr 21, 2026](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/04/21/oil-price-iran-war-strait-hormuz-tanker-ceasefire-peace-talks.html),
  [Apr 20](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/04/20/us-iran-war-middle-east-conflict-peace-deal-strait-hormuz-shipping-ceasefire-tensions.html),
  [Apr 15](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/04/15/here-are-all-the-ways-the-iran-war-has-affected-the-us-economy-so-far.html),
  [Apr 12](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/04/12/oil-prices-iran-war-strait-hormuz-blockade.html))
- [Al Jazeera — day 47 of the US-Iran conflict](https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/4/15/iran-war-what-is-happening-on-day-47-of-the-us-iran-conflict)
- [TIME — IMF: global recession warning](https://time.com/article/2026/04/15/imf-global-recession-war-us-israel-iran-energy-hormuz/)
- [Oxford Economics — 2026 conflict analysis](https://www.oxfordeconomics.com/iran-conflict-us-israel-iran-war-2026/)
- [Dallas Fed working paper on inflation impact](https://www.dallasfed.org/~/media/documents/research/papers/2026/wp2609.pdf)

## Intellectual lineage

Framing and terminology lean on the published work of the DHL Initiative on
Globalization at NYU Stern, in particular the Global Connectedness Report
series and the Trade Atlas. See the
[Initiative's publications page](https://www.stern.nyu.edu/experience-stern/about/departments-centers-initiatives/centers-of-research/center-future-management/dhl-initiative-globalization/publications).

## Reproducibility

The exact computations behind every figure live in
[`index.qmd`](https://github.com/pmxlr8/DS_R_Geopolitics/blob/main/index.qmd),
with derived tables in [`sql/`](https://github.com/pmxlr8/DS_R_Geopolitics/tree/main/sql)
and helper functions in [`R/`](https://github.com/pmxlr8/DS_R_Geopolitics/tree/main/R).
Re-running `Rscript setup.R && Rscript build_db.R && quarto render` on a clean
checkout reproduces this site end-to-end.
